title: drymonia pulchra
intro: Drymonia pulchra is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the orchid flowered drymonia due to its orchid-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Drymonia pulchra include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of the plant include making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
